mapper.select: select iccid from t_simcard_info limit 1000
select t1.*, t2.expiry_date as exTime from t_machine_car_info t1 LEFT JOIN t_simcard_info t2 on t1.imsi = t2.imsi where t1.machine_no = #{machineNo} limit 1
select t1.*, t2.expiry_date as exTime from t_machine_alcohol_info t1 LEFT JOIN t_simcard_info t2 on t1.imsi = t2.imsi where t1.machine_no = #{machineNo} limit 1
select t1.*, t2.expiry_date as exTime from t_machine_drum_info t1 LEFT JOIN t_simcard_info t2 on t1.imsi = t2.imsi where t1.machine_no = #{machineNo} limit 1
SELECT MIN(order_id) FROM t_order_car_info
SELECT MAX(order_id) FROM t_order_car_info
SELECT MIN(order_id) FROM t_order_alcohol_info
SELECT MAX(order_id) FROM t_order_alcohol_info
SELECT MIN(order_id) FROM t_order_drum_info
SELECT MAX(order_id) FROM t_order_drum_info
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_user ( user_num, parent_num, member_num, login_name, user_name, login_pass, pay_pass, org_name, org_id, user_sex, link_tel, user_type, address, create_code, create_date, user_status, bind_status, balance, money_limit, service_fee, is_auto_card, is_configure, is_sms, is_refund, parent_proportion, proportion, dev_type, ppc_proportion, parent_ppc_proportion, province_code, city_code, area_code, verify_phone, allow_withdraw ) VALUES
( #{item.userNum}, #{item.parentNum}, #{item.memberNum}, #{item.loginName}, #{item.userName}, #{item.loginPass}, #{item.payPass}, #{item.orgName}, #{item.orgId}, #{item.userSex}, #{item.linkTel}, #{item.userType}, #{item.address}, #{item.createCode}, #{item.createDate}, #{item.userStatus}, #{item.bindStatus}, #{item.balance}, #{item.moneyLimit}, #{item.serviceFee}, #{item.isAutoCard}, #{item.isConfigure}, #{item.isSms}, #{item.isRefund}, #{item.parentProportion}, #{item.proportion}, #{item.devType}, #{item.ppcProportion}, #{item.parentPpcProportion}, #{item.provinceCode}, #{item.cityCode}, #{item.areaCode}, #{item.verifyPhone}, #{item.allowWithdraw} )

INSERT INTO t_machine_car_info ( machine_num, machine_no, machine_status, chip_id, machine_type, hardware_type, signal_value, location, imsi, machine_label, remark, create_time, update_time, child_user_nums, user_num, agent_user_num, parent_user_num, qrcode_url, new_group_num, poweron_or_not, sale_or_not, rom_damage, power_level, soft_version, water_level, flag1, flag2, flag3, site, pao_pao_json, goods_nums, fence_num, is_fence_configured, is_in_fence, fence_config_time, deposit_config ) VALUES
( #{item.machineNum}, #{item.machineNo}, #{item.machineStatus}, #{item.chipId}, #{item.machineType}, #{item.hardwareType}, #{item.signalValue}, #{item.location}, #{item.imsi}, #{item.machineLabel}, #{item.remark}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.childUserNums}, #{item.userNum}, #{item.agentUserNum}, #{item.parentUserNum}, #{item.qrcodeUrl}, #{item.newGroupNum}, #{item.poweronOrNot}, #{item.saleOrNot}, #{item.romDamage}, #{item.powerLevel}, #{item.softVersion}, #{item.waterLevel}, #{item.flag1}, #{item.flag2}, #{item.flag3}, #{item.site}, #{item.paoPaoJson}, #{item.goodsNums}, #{item.fenceNum}, #{item.isFenceConfigured}, #{item.isInFence}, #{item.fenceConfigTime}, #{item.depositConfig} )

INSERT INTO t_order_car_info ( order_num, transaction_no, open_id, refund_no, account_num, trad_create_time, trad_success_time, trad_fail_time, trad_cancel_time, shipment_status, order_status, settlement_status, buyer_account, pay_method, machine_no, parent_user_num, agent_user_num, goods_name, channel_id, total_count, total_price, user_num, error_info, falg1, flag2, flag3, account_type, goods_num, goods_remark, trade_no, is_machine_returned, return_price, total_time, deposit_config, site, child_user_nums ) VALUES
( #{item.orderNum}, #{item.transactionNo}, #{item.openId}, #{item.refundNo}, #{item.accountNum}, #{item.tradCreateTime}, #{item.tradSuccessTime}, #{item.tradFailTime}, #{item.tradCancelTime}, #{item.shipmentStatus}, #{item.orderStatus}, #{item.settlementStatus}, #{item.buyerAccount}, #{item.payMethod}, #{item.machineNo}, #{item.parentUserNum}, #{item.agentUserNum}, #{item.goodsName}, #{item.channelId}, #{item.totalCount}, #{item.totalPrice}, #{item.userNum}, #{item.errorInfo}, #{item.falg1}, #{item.flag2}, #{item.flag3}, #{item.accountType}, #{item.goodsNum}, #{item.goodsRemark}, #{item.tradeNo}, #{item.isMachineReturned}, #{item.returnPrice}, #{item.totalTime}, #{item.depositConfig}, #{item.site}, #{item.childUserNums} )
